shortDescription: Build habits and routines with flexible schedules, streaks, and daily logs. Fully customisable layouts, colours, and home screen widgets. Simple, focused, and built to fit your life.
longDescription:
Take control of your daily habits with Simple Daily Habit Tracker, the app that makes building consistency simple and rewarding.

Transform your daily routine into lasting habits with powerful yet intuitive tools designed to help you stay organised and motivated. Whether you're building morning routines, fitness goals, or personal development habits, this fully customisable app adapts to your unique lifestyle.

Powerful yet Simple

  • Create unlimited habits and organise them into custom routines
  • Track your progress with visual streak counters that motivate you to keep going
  • Flexible scheduling: daily, weekly, monthly, or custom intervals, your routine, your way

Fully Customisable Experience

  • Choose from multiple layout styles to view your habits exactly how you want
  • Personalise appearance with custom colours and display preferences
  • Organise habits into sections for better structure
  • Toggle what you see: streaks, counters, indicators, it's all up to you

Stay on Track

  • Daily logs let you check off habits as you complete them
  • Add notes to each day to reflect on your journey
  • Automatic log creation keeps you focused on your habits, not admin
  • Home screen widgets show your progress at a glance, see completed habits, active routines, and what's left to do without opening the app

Build Lasting Routines

  • Create routines that group habits together for maximum impact
  • Track streaks per routine to see your consistency grow
  • View comprehensive statistics and insights into your progress
  • Schedule routines to run on specific days or intervals

Organise Your Life

  • Structure your habits exactly how they fit into your life
  • Customise every aspect of the app to match your preferences
  • Export and manage your data with built-in tools
  • Works seamlessly across all your devices

Whether you're building morning routines, fitness goals, or personal development habits, Simple Daily Habit Tracker adapts to your unique lifestyle. Start organising your life today, one habit at a time.
